description: Product detail price differs from listing price
expectedBehavior: GET /api/products and GET /api/products/:id return the same price for the same product
actualBehavior: Listing endpoint returns base price, detail endpoint returns sale price without indication
testHint: Compare price field in list response vs detail response for the same product ID

description: Inactive products returned in search results
expectedBehavior: GET /api/products only returns products where active=true
actualBehavior: Inactive products appear in search results and category filters
testHint: Assert no product in the response has active=false

actualBehavior: API accepts quantity: 0 and quantity: -5 and returns 200
testHint: POST to /api/cart/items with quantity: 0 and assert status 400

description: Duplicate cart rows created for the same product
expectedBehavior: Adding the same product twice increments quantity on existing cart row
actualBehavior: Each add creates a new row, resulting in duplicate cart entries
testHint: Add the same product twice and assert cart has one row with quantity 2, not two rows

description: Order endpoint returns 200 on partial failure
expectedBehavior: POST /api/orders returns 500 or 422 when order creation partially fails
actualBehavior: API returns 200 with success body even when inventory deduction fails
testHint: Submit order for out-of-stock item and assert status is not 200

expectedBehavior: Order fails with 422 when requested quantity exceeds inventory
actualBehavior: Inventory decrements below 0 and order succeeds
testHint: Order quantity greater than inventory and assert inventory does not go below 0

expectedBehavior: Category values use consistent casing (e.g., always lowercase)
testHint: Assert category casing in response matches category casing accepted as filter param

description: imageUrl field is null but no null handling in contract
expectedBehavior: API schema documents imageUrl as nullable and frontend handles null
actualBehavior: imageUrl is null for some products but schema shows it as required string
testHint: Assert products with null imageUrl are handled without frontend error
